nodes.name: 白颊黑雁
nodes.summary: 白颊黑雁（Barnacle goose，学名 Branta leucopsis），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 白颊黑雁（学名：Branta leucopsis）属黑雁属，又稱藤壺鵝(因為與鵝頸藤壺長相相似得名)，这个物种有大片黑色羽毛，使它们与灰色的雁属区分开来。尽管它们外表和黑雁相似，遗传分析表明，它们是短嘴黑雁（Branta hutchinsii）东方衍生品种。 描述 白颊黑雁是一…

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The population has rapidly increased in the last few decades, with more than 4000 breeding pairs in 2024. They winter in the same area as Greenland population. * Breeding on Svalbard, Norway, and wintering almost entirely in Solway Firth on the England/Scotland border, with small numbers elsewhere in the region, particularly around Budle Bay in Northumberland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title=Impacts of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) on a Barnacle Goose Branta leucopsis population wintering on the Solway Firth, UK | journal=Bird Study | date=2025-02-07 | issn=0006-3657 | doi=10.1080/00063657.2024.2443225 | pages=1–12| doi-access=free }} * Breeding on Novaya Zemlya, Dolgy Island, Kanin Peninsula, Yugorsky Peninsula and the Barents Sea coastline in the Russian Arctic, wintering in the Wadden Sea area in southwest Denmark, northwest Germany and the Netherlands
